candidate_problems.text: What precise underlying relational or informational structure could generate both Lorentzian spacetime geometry and Hilbert-space quantum structure as emergent effective descriptions, and what principled derivation would recover the specific mathematical form of each rather than only a vague network ontology?

How can a fundamentally nonlocal or pre-geometric interaction system yield the observed locality, causal order, and relativistic constraints of classical spacetime while still reproducing robust quantum entanglement and no-signalling, without smuggling in the very spacetime structure it aims to explain?

How do measurement, observers, records, and information preservation arise internally within the same substrate so that definite events, decoherence/classicality, and black-hole or cosmological information flow are explained by one mechanism rather than by separate patches?
